hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Damage reduced to x1.5

slot4.lore: Emerged to give shape to emotion. When the world was still new, it shared feeling with humanity, allowing joy, sorrow, and empathy to take root. Its presence soothes unrest to the gods of time and space.
